name: @robotaccomplice/architext
description: Local JSON-backed architecture and dataflow viewer for engineering teams and LLM-maintained architecture maps.

scripts.test: node --test test/architecture-references.test.mjs test/browser-preferences.test.mjs test/cli-runtime.test.mjs test/cli.test.mjs test/c4-documents.test.mjs test/c4-drilldown.test.mjs test/c4-quality.test.mjs test/command-router.test.mjs test/data-events.test.mjs test/data-watch-hub.test.mjs test/diagram-layout.test.mjs test/doctor-repairs.test.mjs test/fetch-architecture-data.test.mjs test/planned-diagram-state.test.mjs test/release-kanban.test.mjs test/release-planning.test.mjs test/release-schema.test.mjs test/release-truth-presentation.test.mjs test/route-ports.test.mjs test/routing-fitness.test.mjs test/routing.test.mjs test/step-selection.test.mjs test/target-layout.test.mjs test/terminal-presenter.test.mjs test/view-modes.test.mjs test/view-selection.test.mjs
scripts.verify: npm test && npm run validate && npm run build && npm run test:benchmark
scripts.release:check: npm run verify && npm pack --dry-run && npm run smoke:pack

author: Robot Accomplice
